title: ECPClr Method, Spel Class
parameters: ECPNumber	Integer expression representing which one of the 15 external control points to clear (undefine). (ECP 0 is the default and cannot be cleared.)
description: Clears (undefines) an external control point for the current robot.
see_also:
ECP, ECPDef

ECPClr Example

VB Example:

m_spel.ECPClr(1)

C# Example:

m_spel.ECPClr(1);
